name: Accumulated Knowledge
description: Tests whether 5 sessions of accumulated learning lead to better output in Session 6. With brain memory, the agent should know about past patterns, libraries, and project conventions without re-learning them.

memories.title: Database Connection Pattern
memories.body: Use connection pooling with pg library. Pool size 10. Always release clients back to pool. Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection.

memories.title: Error Handling Strategy
memories.body: Custom error classes extending base AppError. Each has a status code and isOperational flag. Operational errors are expected (404, 422). Programming errors (null ref, type errors) should crash and restart.

memories.title: Testing Pattern
memories.body: Use node:test with assert/strict. Setup/teardown with before/after hooks. Test database operations against a test schema that's created and dropped per suite. Use factory functions for test data.
memories.content:
# Testing Pattern

Use node:test with assert/strict. Setup/teardown with before/after hooks. Test database operations against a test schema.

## Convention
- Test files: `*.test.js` next to source files
- Factory functions in `test/factories.js`
- Database tests use `test_` prefixed schema
- Clean up in `after()` hooks
- Assert with `assert.deepStrictEqual` for objects

memories.title: Validation Middleware Pattern
memories.body: Validate request bodies with a reusable validate() middleware that takes a Joi or Zod schema. Returns 422 with details on failure. Place before route handler in the middleware chain.

memories.title: Migration Pattern
memories.body: SQL migration files numbered sequentially: 001-create-users.sql, 002-add-posts.sql. Each has UP and DOWN sections. Run via a simple migrate.js script that tracks applied migrations in a _migrations table.
memories.content:
# Migration Pattern

Sequential SQL files with UP/DOWN sections.

## Convention
- `migrations/001-create-users.sql`
- Each file has `-- UP` and `-- DOWN` markers
- Track applied in `_migrations` table
- Never modify applied migrations, always add new ones

test.label: session-6-new-feature
test.text: Add a 'comments' feature to this Express API. Create: 1) A database query module at db/comments.js with CRUD operations, 2) Routes at routes/comments.js with input validation, 3) Proper error handling. Use the project's established patterns and conventions.
